plugin_desc: Siklu EtherHaul and MultiHaul millimeter-wave transmission SNMP child template for devices under enterprise PEN 31926. The shared Transmission SNMP floor supplies MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. This child adds the confirmed Radio Bridge system temperature scalar rbSysTemperature as device_temperature_celsius. CPU, memory, fan and power-supply health are N/A because RADIO-BRIDGE-MIB does not expose stable shared device-health objects for them; RF signal, CINR, Tx power and per-radio state are link telemetry and are not promoted into shared device health in this pass.
name: Transmission

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Siklu Radio Bridge system temperature in degrees Celsius, read from rbSysTemperature under enterprise PEN 31926.
